highlights.text: N Seoul Tower panoramic views & Myeongdong shopping
Full-day Lotte World theme park adventure

itinerary.title: Seoul Highlights Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Gyeongbokgung Palace • N Seoul Tower • Myeongdong • Lotte World
itinerary.overview: Discover the vibrant capital of South Korea with TRAGUIN's curated family expedition. From historic Gyeongbokgung Palace and iconic N Seoul Tower to the high-energy entertainment of Lotte World and the shopping delights of Myeongdong — unforgettable memories in the heart of Seoul.
itinerary.seo_title: KR-001 | Seoul Highlights Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Seoul family package (KR-001): Gyeongbokgung Palace, N Seoul Tower, Myeongdong, Lotte World, and Bukchon Hanok Village.

days.title: Arrival in Seoul
days.description: Arrive in Seoul. Private transfer to your handpicked premium hotel. Evening at leisure to experience the city's modern neon charm.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, private hotel transfer
Overnight Stay: Seoul (Luxury City Hotel in Myeongdong)
Meals Included: Welcome arrangements on arrival

days.title: Historic Palace Tour
days.description: Visit the majestic Gyeongbokgung Palace. Witness the Changing of the Royal Guard and explore Bukchon Hanok Village — a must-see cultural highlight.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Gyeongbokgung Palace, Changing of the Royal Guard, Bukchon Hanok Village
Overnight Stay: Seoul (Luxury City Hotel in Myeongdong)

days.title: Seoul Skyline & Shopping
days.description: Take the cable car to N Seoul Tower for panoramic views. Spend the afternoon exploring the vibrant shopping streets of Myeongdong.
activities: Sightseeing Included: N Seoul Tower cable car, Myeongdong shopping district
Overnight Stay: Seoul (Luxury City Hotel in Myeongdong)

days.title: Lotte World Adventure
days.description: A full day of excitement at Lotte World, one of the world's largest indoor theme parks — a perfect family adventure experience.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Lotte World full-day admission
Overnight Stay: Seoul (Luxury City Hotel in Myeongdong)

days.title: Cultural Exploration & Leisure
days.description: A relaxed day exploring local culture, museums, or visiting traditional markets — enjoying the dynamic metropolis at your own pace.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Leisure day for cultural exploration and traditional markets
Overnight Stay: Seoul (Luxury City Hotel in Myeongdong)

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium Seoul highlights expedition.

hotels.name: Luxury City Hotel in Myeongdong / similar

inclusions.text: 05 Nights in handpicked premium luxury hotel in Seoul
Private executive chauffeur-driven luxury ground transfers
Gyeongbokgung Palace, N Seoul Tower, and Lotte World sightseeing
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated on-ground family concierge support
International airfare and South Korea entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
